## [00:00 - 02:25]

Tough question. If you're looking at top three things in high EQ people and then maybe the bottom three qualities in lower EQ people, what would they be? First one would be understanding yourself. I mean, it sounds a bit strange, but the more you understand yourself, the more you understand other people. When you don't really have a deep understanding of you as a person, then you can't understand other people. And I guess the wisdom there is that we're all human. We are much more similar than we are different. So when you seeking more understanding in yourself, you're going to inevitably understand other people better. I was standing in line with Hey, Wendon, Zander, we're just on a holiday and someone just pushed in and was super rude. And then the people behind me got really upset, really angry. And to me, I just didn't feel angry at all. And I just said to the later, I just said, oh, hey, I don't think you realize, but the lines just around the corner. And then she apologized profusely. She said, oh my goodness, I'm so sorry. I didn't even realize that. I was like, yeah, it's okay. It's all good. And then she just walked to the back of the line. It's just a simple moment where I was observant and I realized that I don't think she noticed that we were in the line because there was such a big gap between myself and the other person. Yeah, I was just more situationally aware, whereas everyone else immediately assumed, oh, this person is a terrible person. They all started bickering behind me. So I think the first thing is in understanding yourself, you understand others. And in that situation for me, it was more like, I've done that before where I've just done something without thinking. And that's what I assume the person did as well. That's the first thing. I love this. I just love this as a concept. I think the how you behave in a line test could be nearly the ultimate measure of EQ. Just to even from traveling recently, like seeing how people were operating in the airport lines when the stress is pretty high, you might be missing flights. There's such a big variety. The high EQ people were way calmer. They smiled more. They were more helpful. They were probably more courteous, more positive like their language. They would have little jokes like, haha, at least we're all going to get on the flight at the same time. You know, like all these kind of things. And then like you could see the other version of it like agitated, fidgety, snarl on the face, yelling at people if somebody accidentally pushed in or put people in a long line, see how they operate and you'll be able to quickly figure out who's high and low EQ.
